In [14]:
# DTI_category by labels=['Low', 'Medium', 'High']
df1['DTI_category'] = pd.cut(df1['DTI'],
                             bins=[0, 10, 20, 30],
                             labels=['Low', 'Medium', 'High'])

In [16]:

In [19]:
# concert Credit_Age into labels=['New', 'Young', 'Mid', 'Experienced'] for  Understand borrower maturity.
df2['Credit_Age'] = 2025 - df2['earliest_cr_line'].dt.year
df2['Credit_Age_Bucket'] = pd.cut(
    df2['Credit_Age'],
    bins=[0, 5, 10, 20, 40],
    labels=['New', 'Young', 'Mid', 'Experienced']
)

In [25]:
#Format Dates as '01-Feb-1994'
df2['earliest_cr_line'] = pd.to_datetime(df2['earliest_cr_line'])
df2['earliest_cr_line'] = pd.to_datetime(df2['earliest_cr_line']).dt.strftime('%d-%b-%Y')
df2['last_pymnt_d'] = pd.to_datetime(df2['last_pymnt_d'])
df2['last_pymnt_d'] = pd.to_datetime(df2['last_pymnt_d']).dt.strftime('%d-%b-%Y')
df2['next_pymnt_d'] = pd.to_datetime(df2['next_pymnt_d'])
df2['next_pymnt_d'] = pd.to_datetime(df2['next_pymnt_d']).dt.strftime('%d-%b-%Y')
df2['last_credit_pull_d'] = pd.to_datetime(df2['last_credit_pull_d'])
df2['last_credit_pull_d'] = pd.to_datetime(df2['last_credit_pull_d']).dt.strftime('%d-%b-%Y')
In [26]:

In [108]:
# Categorize DTI into risk buckets
df1['DTI_category'] = pd.cut(df1['DTI'], bins=[0,10,20,30], labels=['Low','Medium','High'])

In [114]:
# Merge df1 and df2 on common ID
merged_df1 = pd.merge(df1, df2, on='id', how='inner')
merged_df2 = pd.merge(df1, df2, on='id', how='left')
merged_df3 = pd.merge(df1, df2, on='id', how='right')
merged_df4 = pd.merge(df1, df2, on='id', how='outer')

In [ ]:
////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
In [21]:
# Join dataframes on index
joined_df = df1.join(df2, lsuffix='_df1', rsuffix='_df2')
In [150]:
# Reset index after join
df1.reset_index(inplace=True)
df2.reset_index(inplace=True)
In [151]:
# Drop rows with missing loan status
merged_df.dropna(subset=['loan_status'], inplace=True)
In [152]:
    # Distribution of interest rates
sns.histplot(df1['Interest_rate'])
Out[152]:
<Axes: xlabel='Interest_rate', ylabel='Count'>

In [162]:
# Average interest rate per credit grade — helps assess risk-return tradeoff
df1.groupby('Grade')['Interest_rate'].mean()
Out[162]:
Grade
A    0.073353

In [173]:
# 7. Total payment vs interest received — evaluates return on lending
sns.scatterplot(x='total_pymnt', y='total_rec_int', data=df2)
plt.title("Total Payment vs Interest Received")
plt.xlabel("Total Payment")
plt.ylabel("Interest Received")
plt.show()

In [77]:
import pandas as pd

# Load sheets
path = r"""C:\Users\Admin\OneDrive\Desktop\bank_loan_approval ^L0 Risk Analysis-Clean_Data.xlsx"""
df1 = pd.read_excel(path, sheet_name='F1')
df2 = pd.read_excel(path, sheet_name='F2')
In [78]:
merged_df = pd.merge(df1, df2, on='id', how='inner')  # Use 'outer' if you want all records
In [82]:
merged_df.to_excel(r"C:\Users\Admin\OneDrive\Desktop\merged_bank_loan_data.xlsx", index=False)
